# References

## Academic and Research Sources

1. Ahimbisibwe, P. & Muhumuza, R. (2020). *Financial Inclusion and SACCO Performance in Uganda.* Makerere University Business School Research Papers.

2. Asiimwe, J. (2019). *Digital Transformation of Cooperative Financial Institutions in East Africa.* Journal of African Business, 20(3), 112–130.

3. Bategeka, L. & Okello, J. (2018). *Access to Credit for SMEs in Uganda: Challenges and Opportunities.* Economic Policy Research Centre (EPRC), Working Paper No. 112.

4. Demirgüç-Kunt, A., Klapper, L., Singer, D., Ansar, S. & Hess, J. (2018). *The Global Findex Database 2017: Measuring Financial Inclusion and the Fintech Revolution.* World Bank Group.

5. Ledgerwood, J. (Ed.) (2013). *The New Microfinance Handbook: A Financial Market System Perspective.* Washington, DC: World Bank Publications.

## Institutional and Policy Documents

6. Bank of Uganda. (2023). *Annual Supervision Report.* Kampala: Bank of Uganda.

7. Ministry of Finance, Planning and Economic Development. (2020). *National Development Plan III (NDP III) 2020/21–2024/25.* Kampala: Government of Uganda.

8. Ministry of ICT and National Guidance. (2021). *Digital Uganda Vision.* Kampala: Government of Uganda.

9. Uganda Microfinance Regulatory Authority (UMRA). (2022). *Microfinance Sector Annual Report.* Kampala: UMRA.

10. Uganda Bureau of Statistics (UBOS). (2022). *National Population and Housing Census Report.* Kampala: UBOS.

## Innovation Ecosystem Reports

11. Briter Bridges. (2023). *Africa Innovation Ecosystems Report: Uganda Chapter.* London: Briter Intelligence Ltd.

12. GSMA. (2022). *Mobile Economy Sub-Saharan Africa 2022.* London: GSMA Intelligence.

13. Partech Partners. (2023). *Africa Tech Venture Capital Report.* Paris: Partech Africa.

14. Startup Genome. (2023). *Global Startup Ecosystem Report 2023.* San Francisco: Startup Genome LLC.

## Cooperative and SACCO Literature

15. International Co-operative Alliance (ICA). (2023). *World Co-operative Monitor: Exploring the Co-operative Economy.* Brussels: ICA.

16. WOCCU (World Council of Credit Unions). (2022). *Statistical Report.* Madison, WI: WOCCU.

17. Nyamsogoro, G.D. (2010). *Financial Sustainability of Rural Microfinance Institutions in Tanzania.* PhD Thesis, University of Greenwich.

## Online Resources

18. African Development Bank Group. (2023). *Innovation Finance for Africa.* Retrieved from [https://www.afdb.org](https://www.afdb.org)

19. International Finance Corporation (IFC). (2022). *SME Finance in Sub-Saharan Africa.* Retrieved from [https://www.ifc.org](https://www.ifc.org)

20. UNCDF. (2023). *Digital Finance in Uganda.* Retrieved from [https://www.uncdf.org](https://www.uncdf.org)
